text: A WIN-only model has the same obs shape as a BOTH model, so weights are cross-compatible — a child can inherit a BOTH parent and train WIN-only; the schema version stays stable.

locator.quote: Adding a new gene to the population is trivially simple

text: Adding a str_choice gene is trivially simple — a YAML entry in config.yaml search_ranges; PopulationManager auto-handles sampling/crossover/mutation, no Python for the operators.

locator.quote: of a pair matches less often → more naked exposure → more

text: EW-filter probe rationale: Each Way ladders are thinner, so the passive leg of a pair matches less often → more naked exposure → more naked variance.

locator.quote: the agent from trading Each Way markets.

text: The EW filter is a deployment-time env knob (market_type_filter=WIN) that prevents the agent from trading Each Way markets, applied to existing weights with no retraining.
